notes: Strongest domain of temperature usage; full scalar range present
Tea and boiling processes central; strong procedural encoding
Core grammatical system for temperature transitions
Indirect expression via physical effect rather than body adjectives

Temperature terms not extended into colour domain
Explicit absence of warm/cold metaphor in behaviour and emotion
